## What documentation needs improvement?

Link to the documentation or describe where it is (README, docs/, etc.)

## What's the issue?

- [ ] Information is unclear or confusing
- [ ] Information is incorrect
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Broken link or typo
- [ ] Other: _____

## Describe the improvement

What should be changed or added?

## Why would this help?

How would this improve the experience for developers using Arc?
